bluetooth_pairing_instructions.ios:
1. Open Settings > Bluetooth on your iPhone
2. Find 'Clarity SafeBox' in the list
3. Tap to pair
bluetooth_pairing_instructions.android:
1. Open Settings > Bluetooth on your Android device
2. Find 'Clarity SafeBox' in available devices
3. Tap to pair

survival_mode_disclosure: Offline mode active. Some capabilities are limited.
